title: Double-Byte Character Set Mnemonics
text: Double-Byte Character Set Mnemonics These mnemonics are recognized by the device translation table compiler as double-byte character sets. Mnemonics Mnemonic Synonym Explanation EUC Japanese. GB2312 GB Simplified Chinese (GB 2312-80). KSC5601 KSC Korean (KSC 5601). SJIS Shift Japanese character set. The following example defines the Japanese character set: ^BEGIN_SET 0 ^027(B ^SELEC ^SJIS ^CHARSET ... ^END_SET Copy Related Links Developing International Applications Uniface supports Unicode and many other character sets, which makes it possible to develop international applications in different languages. It enables you to take locale into account when displaying, sorting, and manipulating data, and to adjust times to the client time zone. It also allows you to configure an application for right-to-left languages. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
